kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Jl. Dago 1 no 50' into text field 'xpath=//textarea'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

test.name: Pick a payment process

kw.name: Select Frame
kw.doc: Sets frame identified by ``locator`` as the current frame.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Fill the OTP
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Select Frame
kw.doc: Sets frame identified by ``locator`` as the current frame.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Unselect Frame
kw.doc: Sets the main frame as the current frame.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Message: invalid session id; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b95133f5+14875] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9513450+148d0] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b9067576] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b90b2ea6] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b90ea182] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b90e3f82] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b90e3742] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b9030255] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9af6c61+5f80e1] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9af0feb+5f246b] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b162d5+617755] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b95303ae+3182e] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9538acc+39f4c] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b902eff8] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9ccf328+7d07a8] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffc46ef259d+1d] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffc47f4af78+28]
